title: Un eroe dei nostri tempi
actors: Alberto Sordi, Franca Valeri, Giovanna Ralli
plot: Alberto Menichetti lives with an aunt and an old housekeeper, Clotilde; he has a job in a firm and his boss is Mrs. De Ritis, a widow whose husband was killed during a wild boar hunt. She likes him but Alberto likes Marcella; she ...
